overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game showing a character riding a horse along a dirt trail at night, accompanied by a walking companion. The scene features a dark overcast sky illuminated by a handheld lantern, with a wolf encounter occurring near the end of the clip.

events.description: a wooden lantern post with warm light becomes visible ahead on the left side of the trail

agents.ego_description: riding a horse at a steady trot along the dirt trail, holding a lantern to illuminate the path ahead

notable_agents.action: companion walking alongside the horse on the left side of the trail, matching the pace

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt path cutting through tall grass
tall wild grass covering the left side of the trail
tall wild grass covering the right side of the trail
dark silhouettes of oak trees scattered across the left landscape
dark silhouettes of oak trees scattered across the right landscape
wooden post with a warm glowing lantern near the trail edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark overcast night with the camera following a horseback rider from behind. The rider holds a lantern casting a warm yellow glow on the dirt trail ahead. A companion walks alongside on the left, and scattered oak trees are visible in the distance against the dark sky. Around 18 seconds, a wooden lantern post becomes visible on the left side of the path.

events.description: the wooden lantern post is passed and left behind on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride along the winding trail, navigating gentle curves through the open grassland

notable_agents.action: companion maintaining pace walking on the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The rider passes the wooden lantern post and continues along the winding dirt trail. The landscape remains consistent with open grassland and scattered oak trees visible in the darkness. The companion continues walking steadily on the left side as the horse maintains a trotting pace through the gentle curves of the path.

events.description: a white wolf emerges from the tall grass on the right side of the trail
horse rears up on its hind legs in reaction to the wolf threat

agents.ego_description: riding forward when a wolf suddenly appears from the right, causing the horse to rear and then quickly continue moving past the threat

notable_agents.action: white wolf emerging from the grass and approaching the trail edge
companion reacting to the wolf presence and moving past

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, a white wolf suddenly emerges from the grass on the right side of the trail, causing the horse to rear up dramatically at 52 seconds. The rider maintains control as the horse recovers and continues forward past the wolf. The companion on the left also reacts to the wildlife encounter as they quickly move past the area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dark, overcast trail that begins as a steady journey and ends in a sudden wildlife encounter. It begins by following a horseback rider from behind, with a handheld lantern casting a warm yellow glow over the dirt path and a companion walking steadily on the left. As the camera tracks forward through open grassland and scattered oak trees, the scene passes a wooden lantern post while the horse maintains a trotting pace along the winding curves of the trail. The atmosphere then shifts abruptly when a white wolf emerges from the grass on the right, causing the horse to rear up dramatically. Finally, the rider regains control and continues forward, moving past the wolf and the reacting companion to leave the encounter behind.
